SEARCH

com.authlete:authlete-java-common 4.40 API

Packages
Package
Description
com.authlete.common
Authlete Java library used commonly by service implementations and the Authlete server.
com.authlete.common.annotationprocessor
 
com.authlete.common.api
The definition of Authlete API (AuthleteApi) and the factory class (AuthleteApiFactory).
com.authlete.common.assurance
 
com.authlete.common.assurance.constraint
 
com.authlete.common.conf
The definition of Authlete configuration (AuthleteConfiguration) and its implementations.
com.authlete.common.dto
Requests to and responses from Authlete APIs and some data structures.
com.authlete.common.ida
 
com.authlete.common.types
Enum definitions and lists of pre-defined constants.
com.authlete.common.util
Utility classes.
com.authlete.common.util.digest
 
com.authlete.common.util.security
 
com.authlete.common.web
Utility classes related to Web.
